_note: NOT telemetry from .checkpoints/usage.sqlite (opt-in, content-free, cannot be backfilled). This is a one-shot retro export shaped to the oc-telemetry-ops contract so it renders on the same /dashboard surface.
_avg_cost_per_feature_definition: feature = merged PR; 25 merged PRs carry spend
_null_fields_note: pipelines_run / by_skill / eval_score_trend are N/A: interactive Claude Code sessions are not skill-pipeline runs, and faking skill semantics would corrupt the dashboard's meaning.
